# 404 Day

> 404 Day is Atlanta's annual free outdoor music and culture festival held every April 4th in Piedmont Park, Atlanta, Georgia. The event celebrates Atlanta culture through live music, local food vendors, and community spirit. It is free to attend thanks to sponsors.

## Key Facts

- **Date:** April 4th, annually (next: April 4, 2026)
- **Location:** Piedmont Park, Atlanta, Georgia
- **Admission:** Free to attend
- **Website:** https://404day.com
- **Contact:** info@404day.com | Text: 404.922.7545

## Pages

- [Home](https://404day.com) — Overview of the festival, upcoming events, sponsors
- [About](https://404day.com/about) — History and story of 404 Day
- [Events](https://404day.com/events) — Upcoming 404 Day events and schedule
- [Tickets / RSVP](https://404day.com/tickets) — Free RSVP for 404 Day 2026
- [Gallery](https://404day.com/gallery) — Photos from past 404 Day festivals
- [Sponsorship](https://404day.com/sponsorship) — Sponsorship opportunities and packages
- [Contact](https://404day.com/contact) — Contact the 404 Day team

## Social Media

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/404day
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/404day
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qXZFvMsHxNg
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/partyinthefuture

## Frequently Asked Questions

**When and where is 404 Day?**
April 4th every year at Piedmont Park in Atlanta, Georgia.

**Is 404 Day free?**
Yes. 404 Day is completely free to attend. RSVP at https://404day.com/tickets.

**How do I become a vendor?**
Email 404DayVendors@gmail.com with details about your business.

**How do I perform at 404 Day?**
Email 404DayArtists@gmail.com with your act and availability.

**How do I become a sponsor?**
Email info@404day.com or visit https://404day.com/sponsorship.
